name: Print root to leaf path in BT
category: Binary Trees [Traversals, Medium and Hard Problems]
statement:
Given the root of a binary tree. Return all the root-to-leaf paths in the binary tree.


A leaf node of a binary tree is the node which does not have a left and right child.

examples.explanation: There are only two paths from root to leaf. From root 1 to 5 , 1 -> 2 -> 5. From root 1 to 4 , 1 -> 3 -> 4.
